name: Boiled Beef Russian-Syle <Vryonoye Miaso P-ru
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients marked with an asterisk () into a small cloth bag.
2. Tie the bag closed.
3. Add water, marrow bones, the bag of spices, vegetables, and salt to a large pot.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
5. Skim off any foam as it occurs.
6. Cook for 10 minutes at a boil.
7. Add the beef roast and continue boiling for 3 minutes.
8. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 3 1/2 hours, skimming occasionally.
9. Remove from heat, take the roast out of the pot, and slice for serving.
NOTE: This dish is excellent with a honey-onion sauce.
